text: We built a convenient dashboard for programs, requests and internal materials. The workflow became clearer for the team...
We quickly clarified the task, built the structure and prepared a landing page for ad traffic launch...
Requests, statuses and notifications were connected. Managers now control incoming leads more easily...
We separated audiences, prepared creatives and launched promotion without unnecessary complexity...
The project received a clean visual system, clear rules and materials for future work...
The calculator helped explain the price before the request and reduce irrelevant leads...
